betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Better Builder's Wands§f

§aPlace many blocks at once and accelerate wall and road construction!§f
The §9Building Wand§f allows you to place many blocks at once, making walls and roads easier to construct. The stronger material the wand is made out of, the more blocks it can place in a single sweep.

§6Wand Tiers & Limits§f:
§b• Stone Builder's Wand§f: Places up to §c5 blocks§f at a time. Durable enough for early-game tasks.
§b• Iron Builder's Wand§f: Places up to §c9 blocks§f at a time, providing a solid middle-ground.
§b• Diamond Builder's Wand§f: Places up to §c1,024 blocks§f at a time, perfect for large roads and floor layouts.
§b• Unbreakable Wand§f: Has no durability and can place enormous volumes of blocks based on configuration.

§6Useful Tips§f:
§b• Replacing Fluids§f: To replace water/fluid blocks using wands, bind the key §9"Change Fluid Mode"§f in your settings to toggle fluid placement.
§b• Build Modes§f: Toggle between different direction grids (horizontal, vertical, or free build modes) to align your builds perfectly.
